# @platform/adapters-postgres

PostgreSQL adapter package for transactional persistence, user profile configuration, role assignments, and operational state.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-postgres
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-postgres
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: persistence
Bounded context: postgres-runtime
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own PostgreSQL runtime persistence adapter boundaries
- Persist transactional data such as profile configuration, role assignments, and operational state
- Expose storage adapters through public exports without leaking database client usage across package boundaries

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own domain policy definitions
- Does not store analytical event history intended for ClickHouse
- Does not render React components

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by GraphQL, ingestion, access-control, and profile/configuration adapter edges
- Used for transactional and operational persistence

## Boundaries

### Allowed consumers

```text
adapter
worker-runtime
api-runtime
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
react-runtime
ui
direct-clickhouse
```

```text
Test only: false

production
```

```text
profile-configuration-store
```

## Operational notes

- PostgreSQL is the expected transactional store for user profile configuration and role assignment state
